seo.title: TeamConnect — Co-Founder & Community
seo.description: Find co-founders for your startup. Post ideas, apply to teams, and discover tech events. Interface in English, French, Arabic, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Ukrainian, Korean, and Greek.

footer.blurb: A space for people with ideas and people with skills to meet — business, product, design, tech — share pitches, find co-founders, and discover tech community events.

auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Sign in to post ideas, apply as a co-founder, and join the community.
auth.accountDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact support if you think this is a mistake.
auth.codeSent: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below.
auth.codeInvalid: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
auth.otpFailed: Could not send the code. Try again.
auth.otpInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Request a new code.
auth.completeCountryLead: We show your country next to your name on public idea listings so co-founders know your region.

teamWorkspace.pageLead: When you accept a co-founder on your idea, a private workspace opens for your team: discussion, shared links, and meeting plans.
teamWorkspace.emptyHint: Accept an applicant from your idea’s dashboard to create a workspace for you and your co-founders.
teamWorkspace.postPlaceholder: Share an update, question, or decision…
teamWorkspace.discussionEmpty: No messages yet. Start the thread above.
teamWorkspace.deletePostConfirm: Delete this message and all of its replies? This cannot be undone.
teamWorkspace.threadTooDeep: This thread is too deep to add another reply.
teamWorkspace.bannerBody: Chat, share links, and plan meetings with your co-founders.

founderProfile.headline: Headline
founderProfile.seekingRole: Role you’re looking for in a co-founder
founderProfile.skillsHint: e.g. market research, fundraising, UX, React, logistics — not only coding.

startupIdea.title: Idea title *
startupIdea.fullPublicDesc: Everyone sees your full description and pitch (same as before).
startupIdea.teaserOnlyDesc: Only a short public teaser is shown. Full description and pitch are visible to you and to people who apply to join your idea.
startupIdea.publicTeaserHint: Share the problem space and what you’re looking for — avoid secrets, exact metrics, or anything you don’t want copied.
startupIdea.teaserPlaceholder: e.g. Solving X for market Y — looking for a CTO/engineer to build with, or: technical MVP done — seeking a business co-founder to sell and partner.
startupIdea.descriptionHintPublic: Visible to everyone on the idea page.
startupIdea.descriptionHintTeaser: Hidden from the public until someone applies. Be specific here — this is your private brief for serious candidates.
startupIdea.pitchHintPublic: Optional extra detail for the idea page.
startupIdea.rolesHint: Whether you have a business idea and need a technical partner, or you’re technical and need business, sales, or operations — tag every kind of co-founder you want.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Share and discover tech events — hackathons, conferences, meetups, workshops, and more.
community.noEvents: No upcoming events yet. Be the first to add one.
community.postEventLead: Add a hackathon, conference, meetup, or other tech event for the community calendar.
community.postEventSignInLead: Sign in to post an event for everyone to see.
community.postEventFieldDescriptionPh: What to expect, who it’s for, schedule highlights…

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage users, ideas, applications, waitlist, events & announcements, and audit history.
admin.name: Name
admin.editUserHint: At least one role is required. Changes are recorded in the audit log.
admin.deleteConfirmPrompt: Type a reason to confirm permanent deletion
admin.afterRoleChange: Users may need to refresh or sign in again to see role changes.
admin.announcementPlaceholder: Short banner message for visitors (e.g. maintenance, launch)
admin.deleteEventConfirm: Delete this event from the public calendar?

ideaDetail.teaserOnlyBody: Full details stay private to reduce copy-paste risk. Apply below — once you submit a serious application, you can read the full description and pitch.
ideaDetail.teaserFallback: The founder is sharing only a high-level teaser publicly.

landing.tagline: Where ideas meet the right co-founders
landing.headline: Find your co-founder. Build what matters.
landing.subheadline: Post a business or product idea, find technical or business partners, and join a community of makers — UI in 13 languages so co-founders can connect worldwide.
landing.exploreLead: Browse ideas from idea-stage to launched — filter by role and region, apply in minutes.
landing.liveStatsHint: Counts refresh automatically while you browse.
landing.heroPreviewTeaser: Public teaser · full brief unlocks after you apply
landing.waitlistSectionLead: We’ll email you as events, features, and launches roll out — no spam.
landing.whySubtitle: Trust and clarity first — not another endless scroll of vague pitches.
landing.whyProtectDesc: Founders can share a public teaser and keep the full brief for serious applicants only.
landing.whyApplicationDesc: Applicants share availability, role fit, and a real message — not one-line spam.
landing.whyLanguagesDesc: Thirteen languages, remote-first, with filters that match how you actually work — from San Francisco to São Paulo to Seoul.

cofounders.title: Co-Founders
cofounders.desc: Share your idea (even if you’re not technical), list who you need, and match with partners

community.title: Community
community.desc: Tech events — hackathons, conferences, meetups, and workshops

cofoundersPage.heroLead: Founders post ideas at any stage — looking for engineers, business co-founders, design, ops, and more. Apply with intent.
cofoundersPage.emptyLead: Try another filter, or be the first to post an idea from your dashboard.

apply.messageHint: At least 50 characters. Mention your background (business, tech, design, etc.), skills, and what you can commit.
apply.appliedDetail: The founder will see your message. Refresh if you need to view protected details.
apply.validation: Please write at least 50 characters explaining your fit.

waitlist.title: Join the Waitlist
waitlist.success: You're on the list! We'll be in touch soon.
